entities.name: PULSES
entities.description: Leguminous crops characterized by diversity and regional specificity in India

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where pulse production is analyzed

entities.name: AGROCLIMATIC CONDITIONS
entities.description: Environmental factors that determine crop adaptation and productivity

entities.name: SOIL MOISTURE
entities.description: Limited water available in the soil for crop utilization

entities.name: NUTRIENTS
entities.description: Essential soil elements utilized by crops

entities.name: CEREAL CROPS
entities.description: Grass-based crops used as a productivity comparison for pulses

entities.name: ADVERSE CONDITIONS
entities.description: Highly difficult environmental settings for crop growth

entities.name: RESOURCE ALLOCATION
entities.description: The process of distributing resources to crops at agro-ecological and farmer levels

entities.name: UNIRRIGATED AREAS
entities.description: Agricultural lands lacking artificial irrigation systems

entities.name: PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The measure of crop yield, often low in rainfed pulse production

entities.name: RAINFED FARMING CONDITIONS
entities.description: Agricultural systems dependent solely on rainfall

entities.name: HIGH INPUTS
entities.description: The use of significant external resources like fertilizers and pesticides

entities.name: SOCIO-ECONOMIC PROBLEMS
entities.description: Complex social and economic issues affecting rainfed agriculture

entities.name: INSTITUTIONAL DEVELOPMENT
entities.description: The growth of supporting organizations and scientific traditions in agricultural areas

entities.name: TRANSFER OF TECHNOLOGY
entities.description: The movement of scientific research and technology into practical farming
